mapper.sql: su.id id, su.name name, su.menu_icon menu_icon, su.menu_href menu_href, su.index_page index_page, su.menu_id menu_id, su.create_time create_time
mapper.insert: insert into child_menu ( name, menu_icon, menu_href, index_page, menu_id, create_time ) values ( #{name}, #{menu_icon}, #{menu_href}, #{index_page}, #{menu_id}, now() )
